name: Vendor Security Addendum
description: Placeholder per spec-v3.md §48. Full implementation lands in Step 29. Selects the §34 addenda ruleset (security-only portion). Checks: specific measures listed, cadence stated, right-to-audit or SOC 2 substitution, incident-response notification, vulnerability-disclosure, secure-development-lifecycle, data-classification mapping, encryption standards (FIPS 140-3 / AES-256), pen-test cadence.
